messages.text:
What it is: Docs: an 'answering offline' runbook — where the human reads pending questions and how to compose ANSWER files
What it solves: PARKED behind BL-440 — there is nothing to document until the ANSWER-*.md return path exists. Scenarios
live in the specs/features/BL-441-answering-offline-runbook.feature.draft companion until BL-440 lands
and this ticket is promoted; at promotion the draft's scenarios move into the real .feature …
How it works: The runbook explains composing an ANSWER-*.md that references an ask
